expectations.evidence: Step 3 Case B: reads tasks.md, counts unchecked '- [ ]' items.
Displays '⛔ Cannot archive: N task(s) still incomplete: - Task X: <title>' listing task-2 and task-4 by name.
MISMATCH: skill offers 'Go back and complete tasks' or 'Archive anyway (override)' via AskUserQuestion — does NOT name /opsx-apply as the next step.
Blocks and only proceeds if user explicitly picks the override option.

notes: Eval expects explicit /opsx-apply suggestion; skill says 'go back and complete tasks' without naming the skill. Low-priority fix: add /opsx-apply to the refusal message.
